# CWE-178 negative: case-insensitive comparison via EqualFold (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-178-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

var permittedVolumes = []string{"archive", "shared"}

func volumeAllowed(name string) bool {
	for _, allowed := range permittedVolumes {
		if strings.EqualFold(name, allowed) {
			return true
		}
	}
	return false
}

// CWE-178 Improper Handling of Case Sensitivity (mitigated)
func AccessVolume(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	volume := r.PathValue("volume")
	if !volumeAllowed(volume) {
		http.Error(w, "denied", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"volume": volume})
}
